games.explanation: CIN is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Brandon Williamson toes the rubber against Bubba Chandler. The sim projects CIN to plate 5.2 runs — expect some fireworks.

The market has WSN as a +159 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. PJ Poulin keeps WSN competitive on the mound against Andrew Painter. The sim projects WSN to plate 5.3 runs — expect some fireworks.
MIA is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Janson Junk toes the rubber against Erick Fedde. MIA holds a commanding 170-point Elo edge.
The market has STL as a +140 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Andre Pallante keeps STL competitive on the mound against Kodai Senga. STL holds a commanding 62-point Elo edge.

The market has BOS as a +134 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Brayan Bello keeps BOS competitive on the mound against Hunter Brown. The sim projects BOS to plate 5.0 runs — expect some fireworks.
SDP is getting plus-money at +122 and the model thinks that's too cheap. German Marquez keeps SDP competitive on the mound against Logan Webb.
The market has CLE as a +218 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Tanner Bibee keeps CLE competitive on the mound against Shohei Ohtani. Hitter-friendly yard boosts power.
